title: golden days base oritech support
description: This Resource Packs change oritech ors to old school texture
body:
# golden days base oritech support

**As the name suggests:**

It’s a resource pack that changes the original look of ores from Oritech to a style reminiscent of beta Minecraft.

- Mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech)
- Resource Pack: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days)
